MERGE (src_apt35:Source {id:'text:apt35-summary'})
ON CREATE SET
  src_apt35.title = 'APT35 activity summary (provided text)',
  src_apt35.publisher = 'UserProvided',
  src_apt35.url = null,
  src_apt35.published_on = null
ON MATCH SET
  src_apt35.title = coalesce(src_apt35.title, 'APT35 activity summary (provided text)'),
  src_apt35.publisher = coalesce(src_apt35.publisher, 'UserProvided')

MERGE (ta_apt35:ThreatActor {name:'APT35'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta_apt35.sponsor = 'Iran',
  ta_apt35.motivation = 'espionage',
  ta_apt35.summary = 'Iranian APT and cyberespionage group active since 2014; conducted sophisticated social-media-based spying campaigns; targeted academia and medical research; abused Microsoft Exchange ProxyShell; used malware for intelligence collection and a tool (Hyperscrape) to extract emails.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta_apt35.sponsor = coalesce(ta_apt35.sponsor, 'Iran'),
  ta_apt35.motivation = coalesce(ta_apt35.motivation, 'espionage'),
  ta_apt35.summary = coalesce(ta_apt35.summary, 'Iranian APT and cyberespionage group active since 2014; conducted sophisticated social-media-based spying campaigns; targeted academia and medical research; abused Microsoft Exchange ProxyShell; used malware for intelligence collection and a tool (Hyperscrape) to extract emails.')

MERGE (ta_apt35)-[:motivated_by]->(mot_esp)
